content: A classic example of a prostitution hub today is Kotak International Business. Women post sexual harassment are threatened, harassed, isolated in system and then given no support. Sex workers- Anil Lohidakshan and Kavin Shah get promoted as heads of their respective departments, while Mr. Uday Kotak is busy collecting Padma Bhushan. What an irony!
comment: Workplace culture issues are ultimately tested by how complaints are handled, not just policies on paper. Independent processes and accountability mechanisms are essential to maintain trust.
